_comment: Quality Control Configuration File for GWAS Pipeline
_description: Modify these values according to your analysis requirements
_geno_initial_comment: Initial variant missingness threshold (0.2 = remove variants missing in >20% of samples)
_mind_initial_comment: Initial individual missingness threshold (0.2 = remove individuals missing >20% of SNPs)
_maf_initial_comment: Initial minor allele frequency threshold (0.01 = remove variants with MAF < 1%)
_hwe_threshold_comment: Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium p-value threshold (1e-6 = very stringent)
_geno_hwe_comment: Variant missingness threshold for HWE analysis per population (0.1 = 10%)
_ld_window_size_comment: LD pruning window size in kb (5 = 5kb windows)
_ld_step_size_comment: LD pruning step size in kb (1 = move 1kb at a time)
_ld_r2_threshold_comment: LD pruning r² threshold (0.1 = remove SNPs with r² > 0.1)
_het_sd_threshold_comment: Heterozygosity standard deviation threshold (4 = remove individuals >4 SD from mean)
_relatedness_threshold_comment: King relatedness threshold (0.354 = duplicates/MZ twins, 0.177 = 1st degree relatives)
_geno_final_comment: Final variant missingness threshold (0.1 = remove variants missing in >10% of samples)
_mind_final_comment: Final individual missingness threshold (0.1 = remove individuals missing >10% of SNPs)
_mac_final_comment: Final minor allele count threshold (100 = require at least 100 copies of minor allele)
_maf_final_comment: Final minor allele frequency threshold (0.01 = remove variants with MAF < 1%)
